TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Irou matt'i-kaha ta ti Jesus ki mamang k'atta, ni-tpæpænæh lam ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn mou-arugh ki karout-kout ki Cedron, ka akou raoul hynna, ki ni-sa-rarbou-en tyn ki Pahtatæutæu-han-appa tyn.
Irou matt'ikaha ta ti Jesus ki mamang k'atta, nitpæpænæh lam ki Pahtatæutæuhan tyn mouarugh ki karoutkout ki Cedron, ka akou raoul hynna, ki nisararbouen tyn ki Pahtatæutæuhanappa tyn.
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dit geseght hebbende gingh uyt met sijne Discipelen ober De beke Cedron daer een hof wasin in welcken hy gingh ende sijne Discipelen
When Jesus had spoken these words, he went forth with his disciples over the brook Cedron, where was a garden, into the which he entered, and his disciples.
耶穌說了這話，就同門徒出去，過了汲淪溪。在那裏有一個園子，他和門徒進去了。

S.FORM: Ka ti Judas ka ni-si-vanna vanna tyni-æn, ta mou-mhga-ap-pa ki i-tou-kou-'an k'anna, alei ka vounna vounnei ni-mæui-sal-ato hynna ta ti Jesus lam ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn.
Ka ti Judas ka nisivanna vanna tyniæn, ta moumhgaappa ki itoukou'an k'anna, alei ka vounna vounnei nimæuisalato hynna ta ti Jesus lam ki Pahtatæutæuhan tyn.
S.TRANSL: Ende Judas Die hem berriedt wist oock die plaetse dewijle Jesus aldaer Dickwils bergadert was geweest met sijne Discipelen
And Judas also, which betrayed him, knew the place: for Jesus ofttimes resorted thither with his disciples.
賣耶穌的猶大也知道那地方，因為耶穌和門徒屢次上那裏去聚集。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-patou-lam ta ti Judas tyni-æn (ki tama-macyt) ki (raroum'-appa) ka koungcia ki Tama-p'hik ka sï-bavau, ki Fariseen-appa, hi-ierroua hynna mei-koua ki patta-'æ-uyng an, ki eu-nam ka ta-æuyng-an, ki peika-kou-an-appa macyt.

Irou ka nipatoulam ta ti Judas tyniæn (ki tamamacyt) ki (raroum'appa) ka koungcia ki Tamap'hik ka sïbavau, ki Fariseenappa, hiierroua hynna meikoua ki patta'æuyng an, ki eunam ka taæuyngan, ki peikakouanappa macyt.
S.TRANSL: Judas Dan genomen hebbende De bende ( krijghsknechten ), ende ( eenige ) dienaers gan De Oberpriesters ende Phariseen quam aldaer met lanteernen ende fackelen ende wapenen.
Judas then, having received a band of men and officers from the chief priests and Pharisees, cometh thither with lanterns and torches and weapons.
猶大領了一隊兵，和祭司長並法利賽人的差役，拿着燈籠、火把、兵器，就來到園裏。

S.FORM: Ka dou kavan-'an ti Jesus ta mamang ka pa-ierroua-eih tyni-æn, ni tpæpænæh ta teni k'ma neini-æn, Ti mang ta ki'ym-nou-mi?
Ka dou kavan'an ti Jesus ta mamang ka paierrouaeih tyniæn, ni tpæpænæh ta teni k'ma neiniæn, Ti mang ta ki'ymnoumi?
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dan wetenbe alles wat ober hem komen soude gingh uyt ende seyde tot Haer wien soeckt ghy :
Jesus therefore, knowing all things that should come upon him, went forth, and said unto them, Whom seek ye?
耶穌知道將要臨到自己的一切事，就出來對他們說：＂你們找誰？＂

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i v'lli ta neni tyni-æn, Ti Jesus-an ka makka Nazareth. Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Ti jau k'atta. Ka ti Judas ka si-vannavanna tyni-æn, ta i-tou-lam-appa neini-æn mi-toukko.
Nimattæ'i v'lli ta neni tyniæn, Ti Jesusan ka makka Nazareth. Nik'ma ta ti Jesus neiniæn, Ti jau k'atta. Ka ti Judas ka sivannavanna tyniæn, ta itoulamappa neiniæn mitoukko.
S.TRANSL: Sy antwoordden hem Jesum den Nazarener Jesus seyde tot haer Ick benâ€™t. Ende Judas Die hem berriedt stont oock by Haer.
They answered him, Jesus of Nazareth. Jesus saith unto them, I am he. And Judas also, which betrayed him, stood with them.
他們回答說：＂找拿撒勒人耶穌。＂耶穌說：＂我就是！＂賣他的猶大也同他們站在那裏。

S.FORM: Irou ka mattæ'i-komma-hynna ta teni nei-ni-æn, Ti jau k'atta, ni-sai-tatara ta neni mou-aryng tou næi.
Irou ka mattæ'ikommahynna ta teni neiniæn, Ti jau k'atta, nisaitatara ta neni mouaryng tou næi.
S.TRANSL: Als Hy Dan tot Haer seyde Ick ben't gingen sy achterwaerts ende bilen ter aerde.
As soon then as he had said unto them, I am he, they went backward, and fell to the ground.
耶穌一說＂我就是＂，他們就退後倒在地上。

S.FORM: Annata ni-tmauki-la ta teni tmaligh neini-æn, Ti-mang ta ki'ymnoumi? Ka ni-k'ma ta neni, Ti Jesus-an ka makka Nazareth.
Annata nitmaukila ta teni tmaligh neiniæn, Timang ta ki'ymnoumi? Ka nik'ma ta neni, Ti Jesusan ka makka Nazareth.
S.TRANSL: Hy braeghde haer Dan wederom wien soeckt ghy : Ende Ende sy seyden Jesum Den Nazarener.
Then asked he them again, Whom seek ye? And they said, Jesus of Nazareth.
他又問他們說：＂你們找誰？＂他們說：＂找拿撒勒人耶穌。＂

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'li ta ti Jesus, Pattæ'i-kah'-an-ato-mau-ka-mou ka ti jau katta. Heirou kmi-'ym-kamou jau-an,pad'arang-au-to ta neni k'atta.
Nimattæ'iv'li ta ti Jesus, Pattæ'ikah'anatomaukamou ka ti jau katta. Heirou kmi'ymkamou jauan,pad'arangauto ta neni k'atta.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoordde Ick hebbe u geseght Dat ick 't ben. Indien ghy Dan my soeckt soo laet dese henen gaen.
Jesus answered, I have told you that I am he: if therefore ye seek me, let these go their way:
耶穌說：＂我已經告訴你們，我就是。你們若找我，就讓這些人去吧。＂

S.FORM: Alei ka paveut-tauh ta sou ka ni-pa-sousou-en tyn: neni ka ni-phæ-en-hou jau-an,assi-mau ni pa-tau-rumma-en ta ti mamang.
Alei ka paveuttauh ta sou ka nipasousouen tyn: neni ka niphæenhou jauan,assimau ni pataurummaen ta ti mamang.
S.TRANSL: Op dat het woort ber bult soude worden Dat hy geseght hadde : uyt De gene die ghy my gegeben Hebt en hebbe ick niemandt berloren.
That the saying might be fulfilled, which he spake, Of them which thou gavest me have I lost none.
這要應驗耶穌從前的話，說：＂你所賜給我的人，我沒有失落一個。＂

S.FORM: Ka ti Simon Petrus ka mei-tierrau, ta ni-lmouhgout ki anna, ka ni-maphyt ki koung-cia ki Dadyllo ka Si-bavau, ka ni-palikkud tyn tatangira tyn ka ouwal. Kati Malchusta nanang ki koungcia kanna.
Ka ti Simon Petrus ka meitierrau, ta nilmouhgout ki anna, ka nimaphyt ki koungcia ki Dadyllo ka Sibavau, ka nipalikkud tyn tatangira tyn ka ouwal. Kati Malchusta nanang ki koungcia kanna.
S.TRANSL: Simon Petrus Dan hebbende een sweert trock 't selbe (uyt), ende sloegh des Hooghen-priesters dienstknecht ende hiew sijne rechter oore af. Ende de name Des dienstkanechts was Malchus.
Then Simon Peter having a sword drew it, and smote the high priest's servant, and cut off his right ear. The servant's name was Malchus.
西門‧彼得帶着一把刀，就拔出來，將大祭司的僕人砍了一刀，削掉他的右耳；那僕人名叫馬勒古。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus ti Petrus-an ,Pou-karouloung-au ta tierrau oho. Hæuugh kanna ka æyht-tæn ka na pæp'æ ki Rama jau-an, assi-mau yht-tei ta anna?
Anna ta nik'ma ta ti Jesus ti Petrusan ,Poukarouloungau ta tierrau oho. Hæuugh kanna ka æyhttæn ka na pæp'æ ki Rama jauan, assimau yhttei ta anna?
S.TRANSL: Jesus Dan seyde tot Petrum Steeckt uw' sweert in De scheede. Den drinckbeker Die my De Dader gegeben heeft sat ick Dien niet Drincken :
Then said Jesus unto Peter, Put up thy sword into the sheath: the cup which my Father hath given me, shall I not drink it?
耶穌就對彼得說：＂收刀入鞘吧，我父所給我的那杯，我豈可不喝呢？＂

S.FORM: Annata kabatoung-an k'anna, ki Meisasou-appa ki sat katounnoun-an lam ki koungcia ki Joden ni-ta-sal ta yng'it ti Jesus-an bæuut tyni-æn.
Annata kabatoungan k'anna, ki Meisasouappa ki sat katounnounan lam ki koungcia ki Joden nitasal ta yng'it ti Jesusan bæuut tyniæn.
S.TRANSL: De bende dan ende De Oberste ober duysendt ende De dienaers Der Joden namen Jesum. gesamentlick ende bonden hem.
Then the band and the captain and officers of the Jews took Jesus, and bound him,
那隊兵和千夫長，並猶太人的差役就拿住耶穌，把他捆綁了，

S.FORM: Ka ni-mad tyni-n si-ou-rou ti Annas-an: aleika raram-an ta teni ki kei-jen ti Ka-i-fas, ka Dadyllo ka Si-bavau tou tauwil k'anna.
Ka nimad tynin siourou ti Annasan: aleika raraman ta teni ki keijen ti Kaifas, ka Dadyllo ka Sibavau tou tauwil k'anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende leydden hem henen eerst tot Annam: want hy hy was Des wijfs bader ban Cajaphas welcken Des sel: ben jaers Hooghe-priester was.
And led him away to Annas first; for he was father in law to Caiaphas, which was the high priest that same year.
先帶到亞那面前，因為亞那是本年作大祭司該亞法的岳父。

S.FORM: Ka ti Ka-i-fas ta ti anna ka ni-matamha ki Joden, ka ma-tiang-âl-ato, rou kapatei-eih ki saät ki voual mi-v'li ki ta'u.
Ka ti Kaifas ta ti anna ka nimatamha ki Joden, ka matiangâlato, rou kapateieih ki saät ki voual miv'li ki ta'u.
S.TRANSL: Cajaphas nu mas De gene die den Joden geraden hadde Dat het nut mas Dat een mensche boor Het bolck storbe.
Now Caiaphas was he, which gave counsel to the Jews, that it was expedient that one man should die for the people.
這該亞法就是從前向猶太人發議論說＂一個人替百姓死是有益的＂那位。 （太26‧69－70；可14‧66－68；路22‧55－57)

S.FORM: Ka ni-smala-dyllough ta ti Simon Petrus ti Jesus-an, lam ki Pahtatæutæu-han ka pani. Ka Pahtatæutæu-han kanna ta k'a-lang-in ki Dadyllo ka-Si-bavau, ka ni-sa-rarbo-en tyn lam ti Jesus-an tou Iaf ki Dadyllo ka Si-bavau.

Ka nismaladyllough ta ti Simon Petrus ti Jesusan, lam ki Pahtatæutæuhan ka pani. Ka Pahtatæutæuhan kanna ta k'alangin ki Dadyllo kaSibavau, ka nisararboen tyn lam ti Jesusan tou Iaf ki Dadyllo ka Sibavau.
S.TRANSL: Ende Simon Petrus bolghde Jesum ende een ander Discipel. Dese Discipel nu was Den Hoogen-Priester bekent ende ging met Jesu in Des Hoogen-priesters zale.
And Simon Peter followed Jesus, and so did another disciple: that disciple was known unto the high priest, and went in with Jesus into the palace of the high priest.
西門‧彼得跟着耶穌，還有一個門徒跟着。那門徒是大祭司所認識的，他就同耶穌進了大祭司的院子。

S.FORM: Ka ti Petrus ta i-tou ma-la myttouhko tou nganga taf-'an. Annata Pahtatæutu-han kanna ka pani ka k'alang-in ki Dadyllo ka Si-bavau, ni-sa-mamala, mattæ'i tavægh ki Souajam tou nga-ngataf-an, ka ni-papadak-k'nan tyn ti Petrus-an.

Ka ti Petrus ta itou mala myttouhko tou nganga taf'an. Annata Pahtatæutuhan kanna ka pani ka k'alangin ki Dadyllo ka Sibavau, nisamamala, mattæ'i tavægh ki Souajam tou ngangatafan, ka nipapadakk'nan tyn ti Petrusan.
S.TRANSL: Ende Petrus stont buyten aen De deure. De anDer Discipel Dan Die Den Hoogen-piester bekent wasgingh uyt ende sprack met De deur-waerster ende bracht Petrum in.
But Peter stood at the door without. Then went out that other disciple, which was known unto the high priest, and spake unto her that kept the door, and brought in Peter.
彼得卻站在門外。大祭司所認識的那個門徒出來，和看門的使女說了一聲，就領彼得進去。

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'ma ti Petrus-an ta ina kanna ka koungcia ka foua jam tou ngataf, Assi kau-wa ymhou-appa ta na Pahtatæutæuugh ki voual katta? Ni-k'ma ta teni, Assi ti jau.
Annata nik'ma ti Petrusan ta ina kanna ka koungcia ka foua jam tou ngataf, Assi kauwa ymhouappa ta na Pahtatæutæuugh ki voual katta? Nik'ma ta teni, Assi ti jau.
S.TRANSL: De dienstmaeght Dan die De Deur-waerster Mas seyde tot Petrum En zijt ooch ghy niet uyt De Discipelen ban Desen mensche : Hy seyde; Ick en ben niet.
Then saith the damsel that kept the door unto Peter, Art not thou also one of this man's disciples? He saith, I am not.
那看門的使女對彼得說：＂你不也是這人的門徒嗎？＂他說：＂我不是。＂

S.FORM: Ka pa'irong-en ki koung-cia-appa kanna ta mytouhko tou ni-si-apoepoei-en ka na væ'æ, alei ki maharmil pakalado neini-æn, ka ti Petrus ta i-tou-lam neini-æn myttouhko pakalado tyni-æn.
Ka pa'irongen ki koungciaappa kanna ta mytouhko tou nisiapoepoeien ka na væ'æ, alei ki maharmil pakalado neiniæn, ka ti Petrus ta itoulam neiniæn myttouhko pakalado tyniæn.
S.TRANSL: Ende De dienstknechten ende De dienaers stonden hebbende een boor byer gemaeckt om dat Het koudt was was ende warmden haer Petrus stont by haer ende waremde Hem.
And the servants and officers stood there, who had made a fire of coals; for it was cold: and they warmed themselves: and Peter stood with them, and warmed himself.
僕人和差役因為天冷，就生了炭火，站在那裏烤火；彼得也同他們站着烤火。 （太26‧59－66；可14‧55－64；路22‧66－71）

S.FORM: Annata ni-tmaligh ta Dadyllo ka Si-bavau ti Jesus-an alei ki Pahtatæutæu-'han tyn, ki ni-pahtæutæu-en-nappa tyn.
Annata nitmaligh ta Dadyllo ka Sibavau ti Jesusan alei ki Pahtatæutæu'han tyn, ki nipahtæutæuennappa tyn.
S.TRANSL: De Hooge-Priester Dan braeghde Jesum ban me Discipelen ende ban sijne leere.
The high priest then asked Jesus of his disciples, and of his doctrine.
大祭司就以耶穌的門徒和他的教訓盤問他。

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Ni-pattæ'i-dingding-en-nau ki fou tou næi: ni-myhka koua-koh mahtæutæuugh tou Pæu-i-sasal-lan, tou Kouva-appa ki tatamm'dden ki Alid, tou pa-æuätklakl'-an ki massi-euma-eu-ma ka Joden: ka assi-koh ni-ma-sousou tou ding ki mamang.

Nimattæ'iv'lli ta ti Jesus tyniæn, Nipattæ'idingdingennau ki fou tou næi: nimyhka kouakoh mahtæutæuugh tou Pæuisasallan, tou Kouvaappa ki tatamm'dden ki Alid, tou paæuätklakl'an ki massieumaeuma ka Joden: ka assikoh nimasousou tou ding ki mamang.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoordde hem Ick hebbe bry uytgesproken tot De wereldt : ick hebbe altijdt geleert in De Synagoge ende in Den Tempel Daer De Joden ban alle plaetsen t'samen komen : ende in het berborgen en hebbe ick niets gesproken.
Jesus answered him, I spake openly to the world; I ever taught in the synagogue, and in the temple, whither the Jews always resort; and in secret have I said nothing.
耶穌回答說：＂我從來是明明地對世人說話。我常在會堂和殿裏，就是猶太人聚集的地方教訓人；我在暗地裏並沒有說甚麼。

S.FORM: Mang ka tmaligh-kow jau-an? tmalig-a neini-æn ka ni-millingigh, mang ta na fou-au nei-ni-æn, k'it-tei, mou-mhga ta ne-ni k'atta mang ta na sou au.
Mang ka tmalighkow jauan? tmaliga neiniæn ka nimillingigh, mang ta na fouau neiniæn, k'ittei, moumhga ta neni k'atta mang ta na sou au.
S.TRANSL: Wat onderbraeght ghy my : onderbraeght De gene die Het gehoort hebben wat ick tot haer ghesproken hebbe siet dese weten wat ick geseght hebbe
Why askest thou me? ask them which heard me, what I have said unto them: behold, they know what I said.
你為甚麼問我呢？可以問那聽見的人，我對他們說的是甚麼；我所說的，他們都知道。＂

S.FORM: Irou ka pa-sousou-en tyn ta atta, sasit ki koungcia ka i-tou-sal hynna mytouhko, ta ni-tma plagh tiJesus-an tou timi, ka ni-koun-tyn, Matt'i-v'lli-ah-kow komma-hynna ki fou ki Dadyllo ka Si-bavau?
Irou ka pasousouen tyn ta atta, sasit ki koungcia ka itousal hynna mytouhko, ta nitma plagh tiJesusan tou timi, ka nikountyn, Matt'iv'lliahkow kommahynna ki fou ki Dadyllo ka Sibavau?
S.TRANSL: Ende als hy Dit seyde een ban De dienaren Die Daer by stondt gaf Jesu eenen kinneback-slagh seggenDe Antwoordt ghy also Den Hoorgen-priester ?
And when he had thus spoken, one of the officers which stood by struck Jesus with the palm of his hand, saying, Answerest thou the high priest so?
耶穌說了這話，旁邊站着的一個差役用手掌打他，說：＂你這樣回答大祭司嗎？＂

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Hei-rou ni-mattæ'i-rma-rma-koh ki sou, gmail-lA ki ni-pattæ'i-rma-rm-'an: heirou ni-k'm=-'mfing-koh, ka oumang ka tmaplagh-kow jau-an ?
Nimattæ'iv'lli ta ti Jesus tyniæn, Heirou nimattæ'irmarmakoh ki sou, gmaillA ki nipattæ'irmarm'an: heirou nik'm'mfingkoh, ka oumang ka tmaplaghkow jauan ?
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoordde hem Indien ick qualick gesproken hebbe betuyght ban het quade : ende indien wel waerom slaet ghy my?
Jesus answered him, If I have spoken evil, bear witness of the evil: but if well, why smitest thou me?
耶穌說：＂我若說的不是，你可以指證那不是；我若說的是，你為甚麼打我呢？＂

S.FORM: (Ka ti Annas ta ni-pa-ad-dato tyni-æn pa-'ou-koua ti Kaifas-an ka Dadyllo ka Si-ba-vau.)
(Ka ti Annas ta nipaaddato tyniæn pa'oukoua ti Kaifasan ka Dadyllo ka Sibavau.)
S.TRANSL: An(Annas Dan hadde hem gebonden gesonden tot Cajaphas den Hoogen-priester).
Now Annas had sent him bound unto Caiaphas the high priest.
亞那就把耶穌解到大祭司該亞法那裏，仍是捆着解去的。 （太26‧71－75；可14‧69－72；路22‧58－62）

S.FORM: Ka ni-myttouhko ta ti Simon Petrus pakalado tyni-æn: annata ni-k'ma ta neni tyni-æn', Assi kauwa ymhou-appa ta na Pahtatæutæu ugh tyn? Ni-rmau ta te-ni, k'ma, Assi ti jau.
Ka nimyttouhko ta ti Simon Petrus pakalado tyniæn: annata nik'ma ta neni tyniæn', Assi kauwa ymhouappa ta na Pahtatæutæu ugh tyn? Nirmau ta teni, k'ma, Assi ti jau.
S.TRANSL: Ende Simon Petrus stondt ende warmde Hem: sy seyden ban tot hem En zijt oock ghy niet uyt sijne Discipelen : Hy loochende het ende seyde Ick en ben niet.
And Simon Peter stood and warmed himself. They said therefore unto him, Art not thou also one of his disciples? He denied it, and said, I am not.
西門‧彼得正站着烤火，有人對他說：＂你不也是他的門徒嗎？＂彼得不承認，說：＂我不是。＂

S.FORM: Saät ka koungcia ki Dadyllo ka Si-bavau, ka mahka ta'u-ta'u-ei tyni-æn ka ni-paluk't-ten ti Petrus ki tangira, ta ni-kma, Assi-mau kow kauwa ni-k'yt-tan tou raoul ka tou-lam-kow tyni-æn?
Saät ka koungcia ki Dadyllo ka Sibavau, ka mahka ta'uta'uei tyniæn ka nipaluk'tten ti Petrus ki tangira, ta nikma, Assimau kow kauwa nik'yttan tou raoul ka toulamkow tyniæn?
S.TRANSL: Een ban De Dienstknechten Des Hoogen-priesters Die maeghschap wao ban Den genen Dien Petrus De oore asgehouwen hadde seyde Hebbe ick u niet gesien in Den hof met hem?
One of the servants of the high priest, being his kinsman whose ear Peter cut off, saith, Did not I see thee in the garden with him?
有大祭司的一個僕人，是彼得削掉耳朵那人的親屬，說：＂我不是看見你同他在園子裏嗎？＂

S.FORM: Ka ni-mi-la rmau ta ti Petrus. Ka madys ni-mouni ta taoukka.
Ka nimila rmau ta ti Petrus. Ka madys nimouni ta taoukka.
S.TRANSL: Petrus Dan tnoochenDe Het wederom. Ende terstont kraeyde de haen.
Peter then denied again: and immediately the cock crew.

S.FORM: Annata ni-mad ta neni ti Jesus-an padarang ti Kaifas-an pa-'ou-koua tou talagh ka kei-rang-en ki papamæmæg-hen. Ka mæræræmæh-ato kamadama: ka assi ni-mou-rbo ta neni tou talagh ki pæpæmæmæ'-hen, alei ka assi æhid-deih, râ kman-al-appa ta ne-ni i-oukko ki Halidaæu-en.

Annata nimad ta neni ti Jesusan padarang ti Kaifasan pa'oukoua tou talagh ka keirangen ki papamæmæghen. Ka mæræræmæhato kamadama: ka assi nimourbo ta neni tou talagh ki pæpæmæmæ'hen, alei ka assi æhiddeih, râ kmanalappa ta neni ioukko ki Halidaæuen.
S.TRANSL: Sy dan leydden Jesum ban Cajapha in het Recht huys. Ende Het was smorgens broegh : ende sy en gingen niet in't Recht-huys op Dat sy niet berontreynight en souden worden maer op dat sy het Pascha eten mochten.
Then led they Jesus from Caiaphas unto the hall of judgment: and it was early; and they themselves went not into the judgment hall, lest they should be defiled; but that they might eat the passover.
眾人將耶穌從該亞法那裏往衙門內解去，那時天還早。他們自己卻不進衙門，恐怕染了污穢，不能吃逾越節的筵席。

S.FORM: Annata ni-sa-mamala ta ti Pilatus mou-pænæh neini-æn, k'ma, Pat-barau-noumi ki mang ta ka'æuloung katta?
Annata nisamamala ta ti Pilatus moupænæh neiniæn, k'ma, Patbaraunoumi ki mang ta ka'æuloung katta?
S.TRANSL: Pilatus Dan gingh tot haer uyt ende seyde Wat beschuldinge brenght ghy legen desen mensche ?
Pilate then went out unto them, and said, What accusation bring ye against this man?
彼拉多就出來，到他們那裏，說：＂你們告這人是為甚麼事呢？＂

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-vlli ta neni k'ma tyni-æn, Heirou ni-ynna pou-varau tati atta, ynna-kame assli pæ'æ-tounnoun tyni-æn ymhou-an.
Nimattæ'ivlli ta neni k'ma tyniæn, Heirou niynna pouvarau tati atta, ynnakame assli pæ'ætounnoun tyniæn ymhouan.
S.TRANSL: Sy antwoordden enDe seyden tot hem Indien dese Dese geen quaer-doender en Ware soo en souden wy hem u niet ober-gelebert Hebben.
They answered and said unto him, If he were not a malefactor, we would not have delivered him up unto thee.
他們回答說：＂這人若不是作惡的，我們就不把他交給你。＂

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tati Pilatus nei-ni-æn, Arau tyni-æn ta ymoumi, ka dmungdung-a tyni-æn ki Ta-touhko-oumi. Anna ta ni-k'ma taJoden tyni-æn, Assi-kime ha-hei-en pakapatey ti-mamang-an.
Nik'ma tati Pilatus neiniæn, Arau tyniæn ta ymoumi, ka dmungdunga tyniæn ki Tatouhkooumi. Anna ta nik'ma taJoden tyniæn, Assikime haheien pakapatey timamangan.
S.TRANSL: Pilatus Dan seyde tot Haer Neemt ghy hem ende oordeelt Hem nae uwe wet. De Joden Dan seyden tot hem Het en is ons niet geoorloft yemans te dooden.
Then said Pilate unto them, Take ye him, and judge him according to your law. The Jews therefore said unto him, It is not lawful for us to put any man to death:
彼拉多說：＂你們自己帶他去，按着你們的律法審問他吧。＂猶太人說：＂我們沒有殺人的權柄。＂

S.FORM: Alei kapavaut-auh ta na sou ti Jesus, ka ni-pa-sousou-en tyn, pou-kidi kapatei-an ki mang ka kapatei-tih tyn.
Alei kapavautauh ta na sou ti Jesus, ka nipasousouen tyn, poukidi kapateian ki mang ka kapateitih tyn.
S.TRANSL: Op Dat het woordt Jesu berbult wierde Dat hy geseght hadde beteeckenende hoedanigen doodt hy sterben soude.
That the saying of Jesus might be fulfilled, which he spake, signifying what death he should die.
這要應驗耶穌所說自己將要怎樣死的話了。

S.FORM: Annata ni-mou-rbo ta ti-Pilatus mila tou talach ki pæpæ-mæmæg-hen:tmatæm ti Jesus-an, k'matyni-æn, Mei-sasou kow kauwa ka Si-bavau ki Joden ?
Annata nimourbo ta tiPilatus mila tou talach ki pæpæmæmæghen:tmatæm ti Jesusan, k'matyniæn, Meisasou kow kauwa ka Sibavau ki Joden ?
S.TRANSL: Pilatus Dan ginghwederom in Het Recht-huys ende riep Jesum ende seyde tot hem Zijt ghy de Koning der Joden :
Then Pilate entered into the judgment hall again, and called Jesus, and said unto him, Art thou the King of the Jews?
彼拉多又進了衙門，叫耶穌來，對他說：＂你是猶太人的王嗎？＂

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Sykkounoung kow Kauwa masousou Kiatta, ni-van-navanna lava ta rarouma ymhou-an mat-tæ'i-mymmia jau-an ?
Nimattæ'iv'lli ta ti Jesus tyniæn, Sykkounoung kow Kauwa masousou Kiatta, nivannavanna lava ta rarouma ymhouan mattæ'imymmia jauan ?
S.TRANSL: . Jesus ontwoordde hem Seght ghy Dit ban u selben of hebben't u andere ban my geseght :
Jesus answered him, Sayest thou this thing of thyself, or did others tell it thee of me?
耶穌回答說：＂這話是你自己說的，還是別人論我對你說的呢？＂

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'li ta ti Pilatus, Jode-koh kau wa? ta'u-oho ki Tama p'higik-appa ka Si-bavau ta ni-pæ'æ-tounnoun ymhou-an jau-an: kamang ta ni-pam't-ten-hou ?
Nimattæ'iv'li ta ti Pilatus, Jodekoh kau wa? ta'uoho ki Tama p'higikappa ka Sibavau ta nipæ'ætounnoun ymhouan jauan: kamang ta nipam'ttenhou ?
S.TRANSL: Pilatus antwoordde Ben ick een Jode : uw' bolck ende De Ober-priesters hebben u aen my obergelebert : wat hebt ghy gedaen?
Pilate answered, Am I a Jew? Thine own nation and the chief priests have delivered thee unto me: what hast thou done?
彼拉多說：＂我豈是猶太人呢？你本國的人和祭司長把你交給我。你做了甚麼事呢？＂

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus, Assi makka næi katta ta Pei-sasou-an-nau: Heirou makka ni lava k'atta ta Pei-sasou-an-nau, ynna macyt ta mokoua-sy-dda-rim jau-an, ki assi-koh pæ'æ-toun-noun-nen ki Joden: râ hnyn as-si-tæ'i-koua hia ta Pei-sasou-an-nau.

Nimattæ'iv'lli ta ti Jesus, Assi makka næi katta ta Peisasouannau: Heirou makka ni lava k'atta ta Peisasouannau, ynna macyt ta mokouasyddarim jauan, ki assikoh pæ'ætounnounnen ki Joden: râ hnyn assitæ'ikoua hia ta Peisasouannau.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoordde Mijn Koninckriick en is niet ban dese wereldt : Indien mijn Koninckriick ban dese wereldt ware so sonden mijne ne dienaers gestreden hebben op Dat ick den Joden niet en ware obergelebert : maer nu en is mijn Koninck: riick niet ban hier.
Jesus answered, My kingdom is not of this world: if my kingdom were of this world, then would my servants fight, that I should not be delivered to the Jews: but now is my kingdom not from hence.
耶穌回答說：＂我的國不屬這世界；我的國若屬這世界，我的臣僕必要爭戰，使我不至於被交給猶太人。只是我的國不屬這世界。＂

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'ma ta ti Pilatus tyni-æn, Mei-sasou kow kauwa ka Si-bavau? Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus Mattæ'i-msing kow ka Mei-sasou-koh ka Si-bavau. Alei ki atta ni-pei-allak-kin koh, alei appa ki atta ierrou'-âto-koh tou næi, ki heil-ei-mau ta ka-tiktik-kan ki sou. Veiagh ka tæ'i-koua ki katiktik-kan kisou, mil-ling-igh ki yngau-au.

Annata nik'ma ta ti Pilatus tyniæn, Meisasou kow kauwa ka Sibavau? Nimattæ'iv'lli ta ti Jesus Mattæ'imsing kow ka Meisasoukoh ka Sibavau. Alei ki atta nipeiallakkin koh, alei appa ki atta ierrou'âtokoh tou næi, ki heileimau ta katiktikkan ki sou. Veiagh ka tæ'ikoua ki katiktikkan kisou, millingigh ki yngauau.
S.TRANSL: Pilatus Dan seyde tot hem Zijt ghy dan een Konmgh : Jesus antwooordde Ghy seght Dat ick een Koningh ben. Hier toe ben ick geboren ende hier toe ben ick in De werelt gekomen op Dat ick de waerheyt getuygenisse geben soude. Een begelick Die uyt De waerheyt is hoort mijne stemme.

Pilate therefore said unto him, Art thou a king then? Jesus answered, Thou sayest that I am a king. To this end was I born, and for this cause came I into the world, that I should bear witness unto the truth. Every one that is of the truth heareth my voice.
彼拉多就對他說：＂這樣，你是王嗎？＂耶穌回答說：＂你說我是王。我為此而生，也為此來到世間，特為給真理作見證。凡屬真理的人就聽我的話。＂

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Pilatus tyni-æn, Ka mangta katiktik-kan ki sou? Irou ka mattæ'i-kaha ki atta, ni-sa-mamala mi-la mou-koua ki Joden, k'ma neini-æn, Assi-mau paki-valei-en ta varau tyni-æn.
Nik'ma ta ti Pilatus tyniæn, Ka mangta katiktikkan ki sou? Irou ka mattæ'ikaha ki atta, nisamamala mila moukoua ki Joden, k'ma neiniæn, Assimau pakivaleien ta varau tyniæn.
S.TRANSL: Pilatus seyde tot hem Wat is warrheydt : Ende als hy Dat geseght hadde gingh hy wederom uyt tot Den Joden ende seyde tot haer Ick en binde geen schult in hem.
Pilate saith unto him, What is truth? And when he had said this, he went out again unto the Jews, and saith unto them, I find in him no fault at all.

S.FORM: Râ kidi-oumi ka 'æumi'-en-nau-kamou ta sasat rou 'Ou-vavatoug-han ki Hali-da-æu-en. Mamoei-kamou kauwa ka'æumi'-au-mau-kamou ta Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau ki Joden?
Râ kidioumi ka 'æumi'ennaukamou ta sasat rou 'Ouvavatoughan ki Halidaæuen. Mamoeikamou kauwa ka'æumi'aumaukamou ta Meisasou ka Sibavau ki Joden?
S.TRANSL: Doch ghy hebt een gewoonte Dat ick u op Het Pascha eenen los late. Wilt ghy dan Dat ick u Den Koning Der Joden los late ?
But ye have a custom, that I should release unto you one at the passover: will ye therefore that I release unto you the King of the Jews?
但你們有個規矩，在逾越節要我給你們釋放一個人，你們要我給你們釋放猶太人的王嗎？＂

S.FORM: Annata ni-makou-ligh ta neni mi-la makou-ymmid, k'ma, Assi ti atta, ra ti Barrabas-appa. Ka na tama-l'poo'gh ta ti Barrabas.
Annata nimakouligh ta neni mila makouymmid, k'ma, Assi ti atta, ra ti Barrabasappa. Ka na tamal'poo'gh ta ti Barrabas.
S.TRANSL: Sy Dan riepen alle wederom seggende Niet desen maer Barrabam Ende Barrabas was een moordenaer.
Then cried they all again, saying, Not this man, but Barabbas. Now Barabbas was a robber.
他們又喊着說：＂不要這人，要巴拉巴！＂這巴拉巴是個強盜。
